articles.title: Shiba Inu Price Drop Is a ‘Huge Opportunity’ to Burn $SHIB, Burners Say
articles.description: The Shiba Inu ($SHIB) community has been rallying to burn more tokens amid the recent cryptocurrency market downturn, as it’s seen as a “huge opportunity” to reduce the meme-inspired cryptocurrency’s circulating supply. Shiba Inu’s price has dropped 90% from its all-time high seen late last year, with the cryptocurrency currently trading at around $0.00000803 after […]

articles.title: ICI Bucharest to use Elrond blockchain to develop DNS and NFT marketplace
articles.description: The two entities seek to enhance the integration of innovative Web 3.0 technologies in everyday use.

articles.title: Tron (TRX) Risks Breaking Down From 826-Day Ascending Support Line
articles.description: Tron (TRX) has been decreasing since the end of May, but further accelerated its rate of descent last week. It is possible that the decrease is occurring as a result of the de-pegging of USDD, which had been announced as an overcollateralized stablecoin.

articles.title: Justin Sun Announces Hiring Plan to Increase Workforce by 50% Across Tron-Based Projects
articles.description: Summary: Justin Sun has invited anyone laid off during the ongoing crypto winter to apply for jobs across several Tron-based projects. They include Tron DAO, Poloniex, BitTorrent, USDD, Ape NFT, Just Network, and Sun.io. According to Justin Sun, the Tron ecosystem aims to increase its workforce by 50%. Tron’s Founder and former CEO, Justin Sun, has announced via Twitter that anyone affected by...

articles.title: Tron DAO Reserve adds another 500 million USDC to help USDD stablecoin peg
articles.description: TronDAO has bought a further 500 million USDC stablecoin today, it announced on Twitter.

articles.title: Terraform Labs Owned Wallet Behind UST Collapse, New Report Claims
articles.description: A new investigative report by blockchain security company Uppsala Security and CoinDesk Korea has suggested that Terraform Labs may have directly triggered Terra’s collapse over the second week of May....

articles.title: Lido staked ether selloff continues as larger holder unloads 56,000 stETH
articles.description: Lido’s staked ether (stETH) is now almost 7% cheaper than the price of ether (ETH) due to continued selling pressure from whale holders.

articles.title: New research reveals Terra’s collapse may have been an inside job

articles.title: Dogecoin Co-Founder Believes Bear Market Will Last 4 Years, Here's Why
articles.description: One of DOGE founders has opined on how long current bear market is likely to last and why

articles.title: Cardano launches EVM side chain alpha
articles.description: Input-Output Hong Kong (IOHK), the parent company for the Cardano blockchain, announced the launch of an Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) sidechain alpha on June 12 and added that the sidechain is currently available on the testnet.

articles.title: TRON’s USDD Stablecoin Still Below $1 Despite $2B Cash Injection
articles.description: TRONs USDD algorithmic stablecoin has been trading under its dollar peg for more than 24 hours. USDD Drops Below Peg Just 40 days after launching, USDD is fighting for its...

articles.title: Tron’s algorithmic stablecoin slips further from its dollar peg
articles.description: The USDD stablecoin slipped further from its peg to the dollar on Tuesday in a sign of ongoing stress in crypto markets.

articles.title: TRON founder pledges US$2B defense fund after USDD stablecoin loses dollar parity
articles.description: TRON founder Justin Sun on Monday said he will set up a US$2 billion fund to support the dollar peg of the project’s stablecoin USDD and “fight” against short sellers, after the stablecoin’s price fell to US$0.97. articles.title: USDD Stumbles and De-Pegs Just Months After Launch
articles.description: TRON’s newly launched stablecoin (USDD) may be running into trouble just months after launch.
